description: Hunter regains consciousness after being attacked by Creel and realizes Talbot's son is being held by Hydra. Hunter, May, and Morse work together to escape Hydra guards, deduce Malick's blackmail of Talbot, and recognize their opponents are Hydra operatives. Armed with this information and scavenged Hydra weapons, the trio forms a plan to rescue Coulson and Talbot while May attempts to recover Talbot's son.

transcript.line: I hate to be a buzzkill, but this is a gun-free zone, so I'm gonna have to take that off you.
I'm pretty sure it's him, in one of those gel-matrix cubes.
Standard-issue HYDRA. Print detection so no one else can use it.
Great. Coulson's in trouble, the place is crawling with armed HYDRA Agents, and we have no weapons.
I don't hate you quite as much.
You two, find Coulson and Talbot. I'll find Talbot's son.
